headline: American CEOs Were Terrified Of China’s Dark Factories. Now The Race Is On To Build One In The U.S.
summary: Ford's CEO called it the most humbling thing he had ever seen, and what rattled him and other Western executives is now forcing a desperate scramble to catch up before a window closes that may never reopen.

headline: What to Expect From Teradyne’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Teradyne is expected to release its fiscal Q2 earnings this month, and analysts project solid EPS growth.
